testcase.name: Cart and Checkout › TS01 authenticated user should complete checkout and navigate to thank-you page
Cart and Checkout › TS02 non-authenticated user should be redirected to login with next parameter
Cart and Checkout › TS03 empty cart should keep checkout unavailable
Cart and Checkout › TS04 should update quantity, total and badge for a valid positive value
Cart and Checkout › TS05 should keep previous quantity when value is zero
Cart and Checkout › TS06 should keep previous quantity when value is negative
Cart and Checkout › TS07 should handle larger valid quantity values correctly
Cart and Checkout › TS08 should normalize decimal input to integer quantity
Cart and Checkout › TS09 should remove a single item and show empty cart state
Cart and Checkout › TS10 should add three items, remove all of them, and validate empty cart
Cart and Checkout › TS11 should clear cart after successful checkout when leaving thank-you page
Cart and Checkout › TS12 should decrement cart badge after each item removal
Frontend Checkout with Orders API › deve chamar POST /api/orders e concluir pagamento antes de ir para thank-you
Frontend Checkout with Orders API › deve permanecer no carrinho quando POST /api/orders falhar
